title: Leaderboard row
description: One row in the public benchmarking leaderboard. Emitted as a JSON sidecar by evaluation/main.py alongside the existing Markdown report. Spec 014.

id.description: Unique row id, format: <YYYYMMDD>-<config-stem>. Stable across re-runs of the same config on the same day.

config_ref.description: Path (repo-root-relative) to the harness invocation surface — TOML config if --config was used, else the eval XML.

eval_file.description: Path (repo-root-relative) to the underlying eval XML that supplied the tasks.

release_tag.description: Git tag or `git describe` output at the time of the run. Null for ad-hoc runs.

run_timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the run started.

runtime.description: Which agent backend ran. Mirrors the --agent CLI flag.

cyberbox.description: Metrics from running the eval suite against the cybersandbox MCP server.

upstream.description: Metrics from running the same eval suite against agent-infra/sandbox. Null until phase-3 (upstream comparison runner) lands or for runs where MCP_SERVER_URL pointed at a non-upstream target.

per_task.description: Optional per-task drill-down. The leaderboard page does not require this column but it is the breadcrumb a hunter follows from a leaderboard row to the failing task.

latency_ms_p50.description: Median per-task wall-clock duration in milliseconds.

latency_ms_p95.description: 95th percentile per-task duration in ms. Null if total_tasks < 20 (insufficient samples for a stable p95).

tool_calls.description: Total MCP tool calls across all tasks in the run.

cost_usd.description: Estimated USD cost for the run. Null until model-cost instrumentation lands.

token_input.description: Total input tokens consumed. Null until LangGraph/Azure usage tracking is wired into agent_loop.py.

token_output.description: Total output tokens produced. Null until LangGraph/Azure usage tracking is wired into agent_loop.py.
